ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "learning_evaluation_instances" INTEGER /* Number of learning evaluation instances */,
  "evaluation_time_cpu_seconds" REAL /* Time taken for evaluation in CPU seconds */,
  "model_cost_ram_hours" REAL /* Model cost in RAM-Hours */,
  "classified_instances" INTEGER /* Number of classified instances */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) */,
  "sauc" REAL /* Stratified AUC (sAUC) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa statistic */,
  "periodical_holdout_auc" REAL /* Periodical holdout AUC */,
  "pos_neg_ratio" REAL /* Positive to negative ratio */,
  "g_mean" REAL /* G-Mean */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "kappam" REAL /* KappaM */,
  "model_training_instances" INTEGER /* Number of model training instances */,
  "model_serialized_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the serialized model in bytes */,
  "tree_size_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the decision tree */,
  "tree_size_leaves" INTEGER /* Number of leaves in the decision tree */,
  "active_learning_leaves" INTEGER /* Number of active learning leaves */,
  "tree_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the decision tree */,
  "active_leaf_byte_size_estimate" REAL /* Byte size estimate for active leaves */,
  "inactive_leaf_byte_size_estimate" REAL /* Byte size estimate for inactive leaves */,
  "byte_size_estimate_overhead" INTEGER /* Byte size estimate overhead */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of when the evaluation was performed */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Decision Tree, Random Forest) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the model's repository if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., Training, Evaluation) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  "number_of_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "number_of_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations_datasets" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of the evaluation (e.g., Training, Evaluation) */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of data used for training vs. evaluation if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or tool used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
